name: source-file format: validator rejects file whose source: header lacks license_note (G-2 required field for H-8 license attribution sweep)
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > file.yaml
